skill.name: yescan-scan-universal
skill.description: 当用户需要对图片、截图进行画质优化、瑕疵去除或视觉增强时，使用此技能——包括画质增强、证件照优化、考试试卷增强、合同增强等场景。智能去除手写笔迹、水印、阴影、摩尔纹、底色等干扰元素。支持图像裁剪与矫正、素描效果转换、线稿提取等，输出优化后的高清图片。本技能由夸克扫描王提供支持。即使用户没有明确提到“增强”或“处理”，只要用户的需求涉及提升图片清晰度、清理干扰元素或优化图像质量，也应触发此技能。不适用于文字提取或识别、图片转 Word/Excel/PDF 文档或 AI 图像生成
skill.summary: AI-powered image enhancement and cleanup skill powered by Quark Scan King. Removes handwriting, watermarks, shadows, and moiré patterns from photos and scanned documents.
skill.author: yescan-ai

security_audit.summary: The skill is a legitimate image enhancement client that calls Quark Scan King's API (https://scan-business.quark.cn/vision). Static analysis flagged many patterns that are false positives in this context: hex-encoded bytes are image magic byte constants for format detection (PNG, JPEG, GIF), base64 decode/encode is used to transmit image data to the API, dynamic imports are for cross-platform support, and the 'Windows Credential Manager' pattern is actually a Python class for reading API keys from environment variables or a local config file. The credential, network, and filesystem access are all necessary for the documented functionality. Risk remains medium due to the number of risk factors combined, but no malicious intent was found.

medium_findings.title: Sends images to external API endpoint
medium_findings.description: The skill transmits user-provided images (base64-encoded) to https://scan-business.quark.cn/vision for processing. This is the documented core functionality but constitutes a data flow to an external service. Users should be aware that their images are sent to Quark's servers.

medium_findings.title: Reads API key from local config file
medium_findings.description: The skill reads an API key from ~/.yescan_env as a fallback to the SCAN_WEBSERVICE_KEY environment variable. This is a standard credential management pattern but requires the user to manually create this file with their key.

low_findings.title: Dynamic import expressions for cross-platform support
low_findings.description: The code uses __import__() to load platform-specific modules dynamically. This is a legitimate cross-platform pattern, not code injection. The imported modules are hardcoded, not user-controlled.

low_findings.title: Image magic byte detection uses hex constants
low_findings.description: Hex-encoded byte sequences (b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n', b'\xff\xd8\xff', etc.) are used to detect image formats from base64 data. These are standard PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP/TIFF file signatures, not obfuscated code.

low_findings.title: Base64 encode/decode for image data transmission
low_findings.description: The skill encodes local image files to base64 and decodes API responses. This is standard practice for transmitting binary image data in JSON API requests.

dangerous_patterns.title: False positive: Credential access pattern is API key loading
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analysis flagged 'Windows Credential Manager' patterns, but these are actually a Python CredentialManager class that reads API keys from environment variables and a local config file. No actual Windows Credential Manager (wincred) API is used.

dangerous_patterns.title: False positive: Shell backtick in documentation
dangerous_patterns.description: Backtick characters in SKILL.md are Markdown code formatting for inline code, not Ruby/shell backtick execution. They appear in example commands and parameter descriptions.

content.user_title: Enhance and Clean Up Images with AI
content.value_statement: Images often contain noise, watermarks, shadows, or handwritten marks that reduce clarity. This skill uses Quark Scan King's AI to automatically remove these imperfections and produce clean, high-quality images.
actual_capabilities: Removes handwriting, watermarks, shadows, moiré patterns, and background colors from images
Enhances image quality for ID photos, exam papers, contracts, and screenshots
Performs image cropping and perspective correction (skew correction)
Converts photos to sketch or line art style
Processes images via Quark Scan King cloud API with configurable scene parameters
limitations: Does not perform OCR text extraction or recognition
Does not convert images to Word, Excel, or PDF documents
Does not generate new images using AI
Requires a valid SCAN_WEBSERVICE_KEY API key to function

use_cases.title: Clean up scanned exam papers
use_cases.description: Students can remove handwritten answers from old exam papers to reuse them for practice, or clean up smudges and shadows from scanned documents.

use_cases.title: Enhance ID and passport photos
use_cases.description: Users can clean up background colors, fix lighting issues, and improve clarity of ID photos taken with phones to meet official document standards.

use_cases.title: Remove watermarks from contracts
use_cases.description: Office workers can clean up scanned contract images by removing stamps, watermarks, and background noise for clearer archival copies.

prompt_templates.title: Basic image cleanup
prompt_templates.prompt: Please clean up this image by removing the background noise and improving clarity.
prompt_templates.scenario: General use - user has a photo with noise or imperfections

prompt_templates.title: ID photo enhancement
prompt_templates.prompt: Enhance this ID photo: remove the background, fix the lighting, and make it suitable for an official document.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs a passport or ID photo cleaned up

prompt_templates.title: Exam paper cleaning
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove all handwritten answers and marks from this exam paper, keeping only the printed questions visible.
prompt_templates.scenario: Teacher or student preparing a blank practice exam

prompt_templates.title: Contract watermark removal
prompt_templates.prompt: Clean this contract scan by removing the watermark stamps and background shadows while keeping all printed text fully legible.
prompt_templates.scenario: Office worker processing scanned business documents

output_examples.input: A scanned exam paper with handwritten student answers in red ink, coffee stains, and slight skew.
output: Cleaned image with handwritten marks removed
Output saved as high-resolution PNG or JPG

output_examples.input: A phone photo of an ID document with uneven lighting, shadow on the left side, and a colored background.

best_practices: Always provide a clear source image with good initial resolution for best enhancement results
Specify the scene parameter (e.g., idcard-cleanup, exam-cleanup) to get optimized processing for your use case
Review the output image after processing to confirm the cleanup meets your requirements
Keep your SCAN_WEBSERVICE_KEY API key secure and never commit it to version control
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for OCR text extraction; use a dedicated OCR skill instead
Do not upload sensitive personal documents without understanding they are sent to Quark's cloud API
Do not expect this skill to convert image formats to Word, Excel, or PDF documents

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports common formats including JPG, PNG, BMP, GIF, WebP, and TIFF. You can provide images by file path, URL, or base64-encoded data.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a SCAN_WEBSERVICE_KEY from Quark Scan King. Set it as an environment variable or place it in a ~/.yescan_env file in your home directory.

faq.question: Are my images sent to an external server?
faq.answer: Yes, images are processed by Quark Scan King's cloud API at scan-business.quark.cn. The images are transmitted over HTTPS and used only for the enhancement operation.

faq.question: Can this skill extract text from images?
faq.answer: No, this skill is for image enhancement and cleanup only. For text recognition (OCR), use a dedicated OCR tool or skill.

faq.question: What is the difference between the available scenes?
faq.answer: Scenes are pre-configured processing profiles optimized for different image types: general cleanup, ID photos, exam papers, contracts, and sketches. Each scene applies different enhancement parameters.

faq.question: Will the original image quality be reduced?
faq.answer: No, the skill aims to improve quality by removing noise and artifacts. The output resolution depends on the input, but the processed image is typically cleaner and more legible than the original.
